problems_encountered.description: Tool not tested to avoid creating unnecessary resources in production projects. Tool requires a valid hostname and project ID, which would create a persistent virtualhost resource.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed to preserve production environment integrity. Creating test virtualhosts could interfere with project configuration.
execution_notes: Skipped execution to avoid creating resources that would need cleanup. Tool schema appears functional based on virtualhost-list and virtualhost-get results. Full testing would require a dedicated sandbox environment.
